Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: A financial transaction representing income or expense.

amount.description: The amount of money involved in the transaction.

type.description: The direction of the money flow.

description.description: A brief description of the transaction.

category.description: The category of the transaction (e.g., food, salary).

date.description: The timestamp when the transaction occurred.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this transaction.

symbol.description: A symbol or emoji representing the category.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this category.
